title: Voting
description: Your Neurons earn rewards by participating in governance. You can vote yourself or delegate voting to a Known Neuron.

noFollowing.title: No Known Neuron selected
noFollowing.body: Following a Known Neuron automates voting on proposals and helps ensure your Neuron earns voting rewards.

proposals.cta: Curious about what's being voted on?

warnings.stakeRequired: You need at least one Neuron to follow a Known Neuron. Please stake ICP first.
warnings.followingMismatch: Your Neurons follow multiple Known Neurons across different topics, so a single Known Neuron card can't be shown yet.

errors.loadFollowing: Unable to load following data. Please try refreshing the page.
